titleStmt.title: SII 28.127: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 127. (A.R. No. 282 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

The right end of this inscription is built in or moreover it is possible that the four lines on a separate piece are a continution of the inscription recorded upto line 8. Both the pieces refer to tirunandavaṉappuṟam and a channel (ōḍai)

Records a Toṇḍaimān-olai (The Toṇḍaimān is apparently the same as Mañjakkuḍaiyāṉ Uyyavandāṉ Tiru-nōkk-aḻagiyāṉ alias Toṇḍaimāṉ), Mañjakkuḍi being in the kīḻkūṟṟu of Miḻalai-kkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam who signed the document at the end) addressed to various authorities regarding land in Mīdini-kkuḍi alias Dāṉaviṉōda-nallūr, a hamlet of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr and probably at other places, set apart for setting up a coconut grove, and flower-garden and also for the maintenance of those tending the garden. Refers to some exchanges of land. In the portion of the inscription upto line 8 which tells about a total of 2 vēli and 6 mā land, there is an indication that the above land had to pay 6 kalam (per vēli) (as kaḍamai) and kōyiṟ-kuḍimai of 100 kāśu. The second piece refers to 3 vēli and 2 mā of land probably exchanged for some land in Naḍuvaṟkarai alias Jaṉaṉāthanallūr, which was ordered to be enjoyed as tax-free from year 3 and a niyōgam of mūlaparushaiyār of Perumpaṟṟappuliyūr, issued to this effect.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § toṇṭaimāṉ (māṉ) Olai teṉṉavaṉ brahmārāyarum Aiyatuṅkappallavaraiyarum kurukulattaraiyarum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ce
ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum paṇṭārap pottakamuṭaiyārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭu tantatāvatu tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku
kku mutalākat teṅkāy Eṇṇavum pāmpuṇi kiḻāṉ vitiviṭaṅkapperumāṉāṉa villavarāyar ciṟapput tirunantavaṉamākap perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai mitinikkuṭiyāṉa tāṉaviṉota nallūr
ṉṉum perāl ceyvitta cempaṅkuṭaiyāṉ tillaināyakaṉ pakkal parivarttaṉai paṇṇina ceḻuṅkurāt tirunantavaṉam Uṭpaṭa tirunantavaṉamum tiruoṭaiyum Ūrppaṭi nilam Araiyum
perāṟ ceyvitta teṅku tirunantavaṉam Ūṟpaṭi nilam Āṟumāvum Ākat tirunantavaṉamum tiruoṭaiyum nilam mukkāle Orumāvum Ittirunantavaṉañ ceytu tiruppaḷḷittā
tukku Ivvūrp pala kaṭṭaḷaikaḷilum palar pakkalum Aṉṉiya ṉāmattu vilaikoṇṭum conta viṭaṅkaḷil nilam viṭṭupparivattaṉai paṇṇiyum viṭṭa mitiṉikkuṭiyāṉa tāṉaviṉotanallūril Ūr
r Ūrppaṭi nila mukkālum Ākanilam Iraṇṭe Āṟumāvum muṉpu palaruñ ciṟapput tirunantavaṉamākak koṇṭu viṭṭa nilaṅkaḷukku niyoka meḻutit tavirntu varukiṟapaṭiye Iṉnilattukku
Oṉṟukku Aṟukalamāka vanta nellum koyiṟ kuṭimaikku veli Oṉṟukku nūṟāka vanta kācum Iṟukkavum Iṟukkum Iṭattu tiṭṭiṉap pākki Iṟukkavum Ippaṭi Oḻiya puṟa

ṭṭa Aṉaittuvaṟkaṅkaḷum taviravum Āka Ittirunantavaṉamum tiruoṭaiyum Uṭpaṭa nila muṉṟe Iraṇṭu māvum tirunantavaṉam puṟamum tirunantavaṉappuṟam Iṟaiyiliyumāka Aṉubhavikkavum
mum Inta vitiviṭaṅkaṉ tirunantavaṉattukkuc ceṟṟiyākaiyil Innilattukkut talaimāṟu Ivar koṇṭu viṭṭap parivattaṉai paṇṇiṉa naṭuvaṟkaraiyāṉa jaṉaṉāta nallūril Ūrppaṭi nilam A�
taviravuṅ kaṭavutākap perumpaṟṟappuliyūr mūlaparuṣaiy Ār Eḻutiṉa niyokappaṭi tavirntu varukiṟapaṭiye muṉṟāvatu mutal taviravum Ippaṭikku vikkiramacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiyil kal�
ṭi maṇṭalattu miḻalaikkūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟu mañcakkuṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉ tirunokkaḻakiyāṉāṉa toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
